name: Ahmed Hossam
title: Senior Product Designer
about: Senior Product Designer passionate about creating intuitive, user-centered digital experiences that drive business impact. I specialize in turning complex problems into simple, scalable solutions through research, strategy, and thoughtful design. With a collaborative mindset, I work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver products that are both functional and visually engaging.

activities.content: A beautiful interface can attract users. A great user experience makes them stay. UI is how it looks. UX is how it works. You need both.
Every screen has a purpose. Product design is about creating a user experience that solves real problems, and brings business. #ProductDesign #UXDesign

experience.title: Senior Product Designer
description: Led the redesign of the core enterprise dashboard, resulting in a 40% increase in user efficiency.
Established the company's first comprehensive design system, syncing Figma components with React libraries.

experience.title: Product Designer
description: Collaborated with cross-functional teams to launch the 'EasyPay' mobile feature, acquiring 1M+ active users within the first quarter.
Conducted 50+ user research sessions to map financial customer journeys.

courses.name: Advanced Product Design: Design Systems & Scalable UX
